home.title: Equipment Roster
home.subtitle: >>> Yard online — fleet wiring in progress
home.poweredBody: The Eastern Rentals foundation is live. Theme, fonts, and app shell are wired. The equipment catalog, availability calendar, and reservation flow deploy in later phases.

detail.deposit: Deposit: 30% of rental subtotal (placed at handover)

calendar.selectPrompt: Select a start and end date.
calendar.phaseNote: >>> Reservation & payment go live in Phase 02b
calendar.a11yStart: Start date {date} selected. Choose an end date.
calendar.a11yStartMoved: Start date moved to {date}. Choose an end date.
calendar.a11yMax: Maximum rental is {days} days. Pick a shorter range.
calendar.a11yUnavailable: That range includes an unavailable day. Pick dates with no booked days.

auth.checkEmailBody: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Confirm it to activate your operator account.
auth.minPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.

account.title: Operator Console
account.body: Profile, license upload, and active jobs deploy in Phase 03. Your account is provisioned and ready.
